title: Brawlstarsedit
description:
This resource pack adds content from the famous mobile game BrawlStars, as well as many personal developments.
At the moment, the pack resource is no longer being updated.
body:
**This resource pack adds content from the famous mobile game BrawlStars, as well as many personal developments. At the moment, the pack resource is no longer being updated.**

Other Items/Armors you can see in resource pack files.
Example:
You need armor, you can go to .minecraft/resourcepacks and open you archive and go to assets/minecraft/optifine/cit/armor and choose any folder. Open <armorname>.properties and at line with text: nbt.display.Name= Example Boots
Instead Example Boots will be choose your choice. _Use anvil for rename._
**All Items/Weapons/Armors in folder optifine needs Optifine!**
